name: slides-workspace
title: Agent-Native Slides Workspace
description: Agent-Native Slides Agent-Native template ported into Studio UI as a Harness-safe workspace surface with route inventory, provenance, resident-renderer blocks, and display-only agent/action affordances.

files.content:
{
  "$schema": "https://jami.studio/schemas/registry/workspace-manifest.generated.json",
  "name": "@jami-studio/slides-workspace",
  "workspace": "slides",
  "schemaVersion": "2026-06-29.agent-native-template-workspace",
  "items": [
    "jami-theme",
    "panel",
    "button",
    "media-grid",
    "slides-app",
    "slides-catchall-page",
    "slides-home-page",
    "slides-deck-detail-page",
    "slides-deck-detail-present-page",
    "slides-design-systems-page",
    "slides-extensions-detail-detail-page",
    "slides-extensions-detail-page",
    "slides-extensions-index-page",
    "slides-extensions-page",
    "slides-p-detail-page",
    "slides-settings-page",
    "slides-share-detail-page",
    "slides-slide-page",
    "slides-team-page",
    "slides-catchall-block",
    "slides-home-block",
    "slides-deck-detail-block",
    "slides-deck-detail-present-block",
    "slides-design-systems-block",
    "slides-extensions-detail-detail-block",
    "slides-extensions-detail-block",
    "slides-extensions-index-block",
    "slides-extensions-block",
    "slides-p-detail-block",
    "slides-settings-block",
    "slides-share-detail-block",
    "slides-slide-block",
    "slides-team-block"
  ],
  "installGraph": {
    "root": "slides-workspace",
    "dependencies": [
      "jami-theme",
      "panel",
      "button",
      "media-grid",
      "slides-app",
      "slides-catchall-page",
      "slides-home-page",
      "slides-deck-detail-page",
      "slides-deck-detail-present-page",
      "slides-design-systems-page",
      "slides-extensions-detail-detail-page",
      "slides-extensions-detail-page",
      "slides-extensions-index-page",
      "slides-extensions-page",
      "slides-p-detail-page",
      "slides-settings-page",
      "slides-share-detail-page",
      "slides-slide-page",
      "slides-team-page",
      "slides-catchall-block",
      "slides-home-block",
      "slides-deck-detail-block",
      "slides-deck-detail-present-block",
      "slides-design-systems-block",
      "slides-extensions-detail-detail-block",
      "slides-extensions-detail-block",
      "slides-extensions-index-block",
      "slides-extensions-block",
      "slides-p-detail-block",
      "slides-settings-block",
      "slides-share-detail-block",
      "slides-slide-block",
      "slides-team-block"
    ]
  },
  "plannedSurfaces": [
    ":",
    "slides",
    "deck",
    "deck",
    "design-systems",
    "extensions",
    "extensions",
    "extensions",
    "extensions",
    "p",
    "settings",
    "share",
    "slide",
    "team"
  ],
  "shell": {
    "sourceSchemaVersion": "2026-06-29.agent-native-template-workspace",
    "title": "Agent-Native Slides",
    "summary": "Agent-Native Slides Agent-Native template ported into Studio UI as a Harness-safe workspace surface with route inventory, provenance, resident-renderer blocks, and display-only agent/action affordances.",
    "appShell": {
      "id": "app.slides.shell",
      "layout": "agent-native-template-workspace",
      "navigation": [
        {
          "label": "Catchall",
          "route": "/slides/:"
        },
        {
          "label": "Home",
          "route": "/slides"
        },
        {
          "label": "Deck Detail",
          "route": "/slides/deck/:id"
        },
        {
          "label": "Deck Detail Present",
          "route": "/slides/deck/:id/present"
        },
        {
          "label": "Design Systems",
          "route": "/slides/design-systems"
        },
        {
          "label": "Extensions Detail Detail",
          "route": "/slides/extensions/:id/:slug"
        },
        {
          "label": "Extensions Detail",
          "route": "/slides/extensions/:id"
        },
        {
          "label": "Extensions Index",
          "route": "/slides/extensions"
        }
      ]
    },
    "routes": [
      {
        "path": "/slides/:",
        "page": "page.slides.catchall",
        "title": "Catchall",
        "blocks": [
          "block.slides.catchall"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/slides/app/routes/$.tsx"
      },
      {
        "path": "/slides",
        "page": "page.slides.home",
        "title": "Slides Home",
        "blocks": [
          "block.slides.home"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/slides/app/routes/_index.tsx"
      },
      {
        "path": "/slides/deck/:id",
        "page": "page.slides.deck-detail",
        "title": "Deck Detail",
        "blocks": [
          "block.slides.deck-detail"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/slides/app/routes/deck.$id.tsx"
      },
      {
        "path": "/slides/deck/:id/present",
        "page": "page.slides.deck-detail-present",
        "title": "Deck Detail Present",
        "blocks": [
          "block.slides.deck-detail-present"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/slides/app/routes/deck.$id_.present.tsx"
      },
      {
        "path": "/slides/design-systems",
        "page": "page.slides.design-systems",
        "title": "Design Systems",
        "blocks": [
          "block.slides.design-systems"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/slides/app/routes/design-systems.tsx"
      },
      {
        "path": "/slides/extensions/:id/:slug",
        "page": "page.slides.extensions-detail-detail",
        "title": "Extensions Detail Detail",
        "blocks": [
          "block.slides.extensions-detail-detail"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/slides/app/routes/extensions.$id.$slug.tsx"
      },
      {
        "path": "/slides/extensions/:id",
        "page": "page.slides.extensions-detail",
        "title": "Extensions Detail",
        "blocks": [
          "block.slides.extensions-detail"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/slides/app/routes/extensions.$id.tsx"
      },
      {
        "path": "/slides/extensions",
        "page": "page.slides.extensions-index",
        "title": "Extensions Index",
        "blocks": [
          "block.slides.extensions-index"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/slides/app/routes/extensions._index.tsx"
      },
      {
        "path": "/slides/extensions",
        "page": "page.slides.extensions",
        "title": "Extensions",
        "blocks": [
          "block.slides.extensions"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/slides/app/routes/extensions.tsx"
      },
      {
        "path": "/slides/p/:id",
        "page": "page.slides.p-detail",
        "title": "P Detail",
        "blocks": [
          "block.slides.p-detail"

        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/slides/app/routes/p.$id.tsx"
      },
      {
        "path": "/slides/settings",
        "page": "page.slides.settings",
        "title": "Settings",
        "blocks": [
          "block.slides.settings"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/slides/app/routes/settings.tsx"
      },
      {
        "path": "/slides/share/:token",

        "title": "Share Detail",

        "components": [
          "media-grid",
          "panel",

      },
      {

        "components": [

      },
      {

      }
    ],
    "blocks": [
      {

lifecycle.migrationNotes: Agent-Native Agent-Native Slides template imported from yrka-io/agent-native as a complete Studio UI workspace shell over all discovered route files; execution remains display-only behind Jami Harness contracts.

upstream.importedAs: jami-authored workspace shell and registry metadata derived from Agent-Native template structure

compatibility.shadcn: Studio UI registry metadata generated from Agent-Native template route inventory; source app remains upstream-owned until forked into Jami packages.
compatibility.tailwind: Consumes generated --jami-* CSS variables in the Studio UI workbench port.
